resultList.dtldesc: Presenting a well designed 3 BHK apartment for sale in TVS Emerald Altura, Sathanur, North Bangalore, offering modern high rise living in one of the fastest developing residential corridors of the city. The property features a carpet area of approximately 1054 sq. ft, thoughtfully designed for efficient space utilisation and modern family living.::::The layout includes 3 spacious bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and 2 balconies that ensure natural light and airflow throughout the home. The apartment is unfurnished, allowing full flexibility to design interiors as per personal preference and lifestyle needs.::::The north facing orientation supports balanced daylight and a pleasant indoor environment. The project offers multiple high rise towers with modern architecture and well planned residential layouts, ensuring a premium community living experience.::::With 3 lifts in the building, residents benefit from smooth vertical mobility even during peak hours. The area benefits from improving connectivity to Kempegowda International Airport, Hebbal, and key IT corridors, making it attractive for professionals and investors.::::The locality is witnessing steady residential development due to upcoming infrastructure, planned road networks, and proximity to employment hubs. It offers access to schools, healthcare facilities, and daily conveniences within a reasonable distance, supporting comfortable family living.::::With ongoing development in North Bangalore, the area is expected to see significant appreciation, making it a promising long term residential destination.

The interiors are finished with a tasteful mix of granite and tile flooring which adds elegance and ease of maintenance. The semi furnished setup provides a perfect foundation for personal customization and modern family living. The villa also includes two dedicated car parking spaces which adds to everyday convenience.::::Facilities::::The home enjoys consistent water supply from both municipal and borewell sources and sits within a secure and well organized residential setup. The garden view and open surroundings create a calm and welcoming ambiance making it ideal for both personal living and long term investment. The terrace provides a lovely outdoor space for relaxation while the greenery and layout promote a balanced lifestyle.::::Locality::::Strategically located just 10 to 20 meters from the main road the property ensures smooth accessibility to nearby areas while maintaining a peaceful atmosphere. Public transportation is already functional with regular buses available in the locality making daily commuting easy and dependable. Essential services such as a school and hospital are located within 100 meters from the property.
